name: conext-skills
description: Depth pack for ACM CoNEXT manuscript routing, the two-cycle (December/June) calendar, journal-style one-shot major-revision handling, double-anonymous submission, systems-networking evidence, SIGCOMM public review and shepherding, reproducibility badging, and PACMNET camera-ready work.

plugins.name: conext-skills
plugins.description: Twelve CoNEXT-specific skills for the ACM International Conference on emerging Networking EXperiments and Technologies and its PACMNET journal-style publication model, grounded in the CoNEXT 2026/2025 calls, PACMNET journal pages, ACM Digital Library, and dblp.
